title: API create new monday Doc
excerpt:
Hi! Is there any way for me to use the API to create a Monday Workdoc (or Monday Doc)? I don’t believe there is, after extensively browsing the API documentation, and I’d really love this feature. 
Thanks!

posts.author: juancarlos (Juan Carlos Ortiz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! Is there any way for me to use the API to create a Monday Workdoc (or Monday Doc)? I don’t believe there is, after extensively browsing the API documentation, and I’d really love this feature.

Thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @juancarlos and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today there is no way of doing that. But I will add your vote towards that feature request

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
